overall.description: A scene from a Harry Potter video game showing students in wizard robes practicing broomstick flying on a grassy training ground enclosed by castle walls. The stationary camera captures NPCs repeatedly mounting brooms, attempting short flights, and falling in a continuous training loop.

scene_state.functional_zone: broomstick training ground within castle walls

student falls off broomstick and tumbles onto grass

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed on a grassy training ground enclosed by Hogwarts castle walls, where students in black wizard robes practice mounting and flying broomsticks. Wooden training towers with flags stand at the field's edges, and forested mountains rise in the background. Students scatter across the field attempting to fly, with some successfully lifting off while others tumble to the grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady gaze over a bustling wizarding training ground where students struggle to master the art of broomstick flight. It begins with a wide view of the grassy field enclosed by the towering walls of Hogwarts, with forested mountains looming in the distance. As the scene unfolds, the focus remains on the scattered students in black robes who repeatedly mount their brooms near wooden training towers adorned with flags. The action shifts between those successfully lifting off into the air and others tumbling back to the grass in a continuous cycle of practice.
